inclusions: Room rent up to Rs. 10,000 per day
exclusions: Dental procedures not related to accident
subLimits: Room sharing waiver: Rs. 5,000 per day
text: Care Health Plan is designed for clients who want strong hospitalization cover with zero co-pay. It offers cashless hospitalization nationwide and covers pre-existing conditions after the waiting period. The plan includes a 24-month waiting period for pre-existing diseases and a 0% co-pay on eligible claims.
